mapper.select: SELECT 'nearMissReport' AS title ,'/NearMissReport' AS route ,'nearMissReportDesc' AS description , case when nearMissReport.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_near_miss_report tnmr WHERE tnmr.comp_id = #{compId} AND tnmr.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS nearMissReport UNION ALL SELECT 'incidentReport' AS title ,'/IncidentReport' AS route ,'incidentReportDesc' AS description , case when incidentReport.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_incident_report tir WHERE tir.comp_id = #{compId} AND tir.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS incidentReport UNION ALL SELECT 'correctiveActionRequest' AS title ,'/CorrectiveActionRequest' AS route ,'correctiveActionRequestDesc' AS description , case when correctiveActionRequest.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_corrective_action_request tcar WHERE tcar.comp_id = #{compId} AND tcar.write_year = #{searchText} AND tcar.car_type = 'I' ) as exist ) AS correctiveActionRequest

select a.hr_id as orgnHeadId, b.hr_nm as orgnHeadNm from esg.tb_hr_incharge_map a inner join esg.tb_hr_info b on a.hr_id = b.hr_id where b.orgn_id = #{actionOrgnId} and a.gubun = 'HEAD' and a.target_type = 'orgn'
SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_NM AS FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE AS DOC_TYPE, "extension" FROM ESG.TB_SYS_FILE WHERE TARGET_ID = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) AND TARGET_TYPE = #{docType}

SELECT TNMR.WRITE_YEAR, TNMR.DOC_TYPE, TNMR.DOC_NO, TNMR.COMP_ID, TNMR.HR_ID, TNMR.HR_NM, TNMR.CREAT_ORGN_ID, TNMR.CREAT_ORGN_NM, TNMR.ACTION_ORGN_ID, TNMR.ACTION_ORGN_NM, TNMR.ACCIDENT_CONTENT, TNMR.ACCIDENT_IMPROVED, TNMR.DANGER_CONTENT, TNMR.DANGER_IMPROVED, TNMR.ACTION_CONTENT, TNMR.WRITE_DT, TNMR.RECEIPT_DT, TNMR.ACTION_DT, TNMR.USE_YN, TNMR.CREATED_AT, TNMR.CREATED_BY, TNMR.UPDATED_AT FROM ESG.TB_NEAR_MISS_REPORT TNMR WHERE TNMR.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND TNMR.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} ORDER BY TNMR.USE_YN DESC, TNMR.DOC_NO DESC

SELECT TNMR.WRITE_YEAR, TNMR.DOC_TYPE, TNMR.DOC_NO, TNMR.COMP_ID, TNMR.HR_ID, TNMR.HR_NM, TNMR.CREAT_ORGN_ID, TNMR.CREAT_ORGN_NM, TNMR.ACTION_ORGN_ID, TNMR.ACTION_ORGN_NM, TNMR.ACCIDENT_CONTENT, TNMR.ACCIDENT_IMPROVED, TNMR.DANGER_CONTENT, TNMR.DANGER_IMPROVED, TNMR.ACTION_CONTENT, TNMR.WRITE_DT, TNMR.RECEIPT_DT, TNMR.ACTION_DT, TNMR.USE_YN, TNMR.CREATED_AT, TNMR.CREATED_BY, TNMR.UPDATED_AT, TNMR.UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_NEAR_MISS_REPORT TNMR WHERE DOC_NO = #{docNo}
mapper.insert:
select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') AS DOC_NO from esg.tb_near_miss_report where write_year = #{writeYear}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_near_miss_report ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, hr_id, hr_nm, creat_orgn_id, creat_orgn_nm, action_orgn_id, action_orgn_nm, accident_content, accident_improved, danger_content, danger_improved, action_content, write_dt, receipt_dt, action_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY'), 'NMR', (select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') from esg.tb_near_miss_report), #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{creatOrgnId}, #{creatOrgnNm}, #{actionOrgnId}, #{actionOrgnNm}, #{accidentContent}, #{accidentImproved}, #{dangerContent}, #{dangerImproved}, #{actionContent}, #{writeDt}, #{receiptDt}, #{actionDt}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} );
mapper.update: UPDATE ESG.TB_NEAR_MISS_REPORT SET action_orgn_id = #{actionOrgnId}, action_orgn_nm = #{actionOrgnNm}, accident_content = #{accidentContent}, accident_improved = #{accidentImproved}, danger_content = #{dangerContent}, danger_improved = #{dangerImproved}, action_content = #{actionContent}, write_dt = #{writeDt}, receipt_dt = #{receiptDt}, action_dt = #{actionDt}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE DOC_NO = #{docNo}
mapper.select: SELECT MSDS_ID, COMP_ID, MSDS_NM, MSDS_SYNONYM, CAS_NO, DAILY_VOLUME, DAILY_TIME, "desc", ORD_SEQ, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND MSDS_ID = #{msdsId}

SELECT WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, CAR_TYPE, TITLE, CTRL_ORGN_ID, CTRL_ORGN_NM, ACTION_ORGN_ID, ACTION_ORGN_NM, WRITE_DT, RETURN_DT, ACTION_REQUEST_CONTENT, ANALYTIC_PREVENT_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_YN, CHECK_DT, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST TEI WHERE 1=1 AND WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND CAR_TYPE = 'I'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO esg.tb_corrective_action_request( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, CAR_TYPE, TITLE, CTRL_ORGN_ID, CTRL_ORGN_NM, ACTION_ORGN_ID, ACTION_ORGN_NM,
WRITE_DT,
RETURN_DT,
ACTION_REQUEST_CONTENT, ANALYTIC_PREVENT_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_YN,
CHECK_DT,
USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, 'CAR', (SELECT LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') AS doc_no FROM ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST CAR WHERE CAR.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear}), #{compId}, 'I', #{title}, #{ctrlOrgnId}, #{ctrlOrgnNm}, #{actionOrgnId}, #{actionOrgnNm}, #{writeDt}, #{returnDt}, #{actionRequestContent}, #{analyticPreventContent}, #{resultValidationContent}, #{resultValidationYn}, #{checkDt}, 'Y', NOW(), #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{updatedBy} );
SELECT MAX(DOC_NO) DOC_NO FROM ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST WHERE 1=1 AND WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_TYPE = 'CAR' AND CAR_TYPE = 'I'
mapper.update: UPDATE ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST SET COMP_ID =#{compId}, TITLE =#{title}, CTRL_ORGN_ID =#{ctrlOrgnId}, CTRL_ORGN_NM =#{ctrlOrgnNm}, ACTION_ORGN_ID =#{actionOrgnId}, ACTION_ORGN_NM =#{actionOrgnNm}, WRITE_DT =#{writeDt}, RETURN_DT =#{returnDt}, ACTION_REQUEST_CONTENT =#{actionRequestContent}, ANALYTIC_PREVENT_CONTENT =#{analyticPreventContent}, RESULT_VALIDATION_CONTENT =#{resultValidationContent}, RESULT_VALIDATION_YN =#{resultValidationYn}, CHECK_DT =#{checkDt}, USE_YN =#{useYn}, UPDATED_AT =NOW(), UPDATED_BY =#{updatedBy} WHERE 1=1 AND WRITE_YEAR =#{writeYear} AND DOC_NO =#{docNo} AND CAR_TYPE ='I'
mapper.select: SELECT tir.write_year, doc_type, tir.doc_no, tir.comp_id, incident_person_id, incident_person_nm, witness_person_id, witness_person_nm, tir.incident_dt, incident_tm, thi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, incident_location, incident_extent, comp_opinion, incident_type, incident_his, tir.use_yn, COALESCE(tirm.hosp_in, 0) AS hosp_in, COALESCE(tirm.hosp_out, 0) AS hosp_out FROM esg.tb_incident_report tir LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON tir.incident_person_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tirm.write_year, tirm.doc_no, SUM( CASE WHEN hosp_in_fr_dt is null OR tirm.hosp_in_to_dt is null THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(DATE_PART('day', tirm.hosp_in_to_dt::timestamp - tirm.hosp_in_fr_dt::timestamp) + 1, 0) END )AS hosp_in, SUM( CASE WHEN hosp_out_fr_dt is null OR hosp_out_to_dt is null THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(DATE_PART('day', coalesce(tirm.hosp_out_to_dt)::timestamp - tirm.hosp_out_fr_dt::timestamp) + 1, 0) END )AS hosp_out FROM esg.tb_incident_report_manage tirm WHERE tirm.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY tirm.write_year, tirm.doc_no ) AS tirm ON tir.write_year = tirm.write_year AND tir.doc_no = tirm.doc_no WHERE tir.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tir.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY tir.created_at DESC;

select write_year, doc_type, tir.doc_no, tir.comp_id, incident_person_id, incident_person_nm, coalesce (witness_person_id,'') as witness_person_id, coalesce (witness_person_nm,'') as witness_person_nm, incident_dt , coalesce (incident_tm,'') as incident_tm, coalesce (incident_location,'') as incident_location, coalesce (incident_extent,'') as incident_extent, coalesce (comp_opinion,'') as comp_opinion, coalesce (incident_type,'') as incident_type, coalesce (incident_his,'') as incident_his, coalesce (vhi.orgn_id,'') as orgn_id, coalesce (jbrp.jbrp_nm,'') as jbrp_nm, coalesce (vhi.birth_dt,'') as birth_dt, coalesce (vhi.phone,'') as phone, vhi.working_at, coalesce ((vhi.addrs1 || vhi.addrs2 ),'') as addrs, case when vhi.part_comp_id ='' or vhi.part_comp_id is null then '본사' else '협력사' end as part_comp, coalesce (toi.orgn_nm,'') as orgn_nm, coalesce (vhi2.orgn_id,'') as worgn_id, coalesce (jbrp2.jbrp_nm,'') as wjbrp_nm, coalesce (vhi2.birth_dt,'') as wbirth_dt, coalesce (vhi2.phone,'') as wphone, coalesce (vhi2.working_at,'') as wworking_at, coalesce ((vhi2.addrs1 || vhi2.addrs2 ),'') as waddrs, case when witness_person_id ='' or witness_person_id isnull then '' when vhi2.part_comp_id ='' or vhi2.part_comp_id is null then '본사' else '협력사' end as wpart_comp, coalesce (toi2.orgn_nm,'') as worgn_nm, coalesce (tir.use_yn,'') as use_yn, coalesce (tsf.file_id,'') as ifile_id, coalesce (tsf2.file_id,'') as wfile_id, coalesce(tir.incident_pm_so,'') as incident_pm_so from esg.tb_incident_report tir left join esg.v_hr_info vhi on tir.incident_person_id =vhi.hr_id left join esg.v_hr_info vhi2 on tir.witness_person_id =vhi2.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on vhi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi2 on vhi2.orgn_id = toi2.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp2 on jbrp2.jbrp_id = vhi2.jbrp and jbrp2.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_sys_file tsf on tsf.target_id = tir.incident_person_id and tsf.target_type='hrImg' left join esg.tb_sys_file tsf2 on tsf2.target_id = tir.witness_person_id and tsf2.target_type='hrImg' where tir.doc_no=#{docNo} and tir.write_year=#{writeYear}

SELECT write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, hospital_nm, hospital_tel, hospital_pl, hosp_in_fr_dt, hosp_in_to_dt, hosp_out_fr_dt, hosp_out_to_dt, CASE WHEN hosp_in_fr_dt is null OR hosp_in_to_dt is null THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(date_part('day', hosp_in_to_dt::timestamp - hosp_in_fr_dt::timestamp) + 1, 0) END AS hosp_in, CASE WHEN hosp_out_fr_dt is null OR hosp_out_to_dt is null THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(date_part('day', hosp_out_to_dt::timestamp - hosp_out_fr_dt::timestamp) + 1, 0) END AS hosp_out, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, use_yn FROM esg.tb_incident_report_manage where doc_no=#{docNo} and write_year=#{writeYear} order by doc_seq;

SELECT tird.write_year, tird.doc_type, tird.doc_no, tird.doc_seq, tird.incident_detail, tird.created_at, tird.created_by, tird.updated_at, tird.updated_by, tird.use_yn FROM esg.tb_incident_report_detail tird where doc_no=#{docNo} and write_year=#{writeYear} order by doc_seq;

SELECT write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, preventive_measures, supervisors_opinion, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, use_yn FROM esg.tb_incident_report_opinion where doc_no=#{docNo} and write_year=#{writeYear} order by doc_seq;
select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as doc_no from esg.tb_incident_report where write_year=#{writeYear};
select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as doc_Seq from esg.tb_incident_report_detail where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_no = #{docNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_incident_report (write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, incident_person_id, incident_person_nm, witness_person_id, witness_person_nm, incident_dt, incident_tm, incident_location, incident_extent, comp_opinion, incident_type, incident_his, use_yn, created_at, created_by, incident_pm_so) VALUES( LEFT(#{incidentDt}, 4), 'ICR', (select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') from esg.tb_incident_report where write_year=LEFT(#{incidentDt}, 4)), #{compId}, #{incidentPersonId}, #{incidentPersonNm}, #{witnessPersonId}, #{witnessPersonNm}, #{incidentDt}, #{incidentTm}, #{incidentLocation}, #{incidentExtent}, #{compOpinion}, #{incidentType}, #{incidentHis}, 'Y'::character varying, now(), #{createdBy}, #{incidentPmSo} );

INSERT INTO esg.tb_incident_report_detail (write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, incident_detail, use_yn, created_at, created_by) VALUES( #{writeYear}, 'ICR', #{docNo}, (select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') from esg.tb_incident_report_detail where write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no=#{docNo}), #{incidentDetail}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy});

INSERT INTO esg.tb_incident_report_manage (write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, hospital_nm, hospital_tel, hospital_pl, hosp_in_fr_dt, hosp_in_to_dt, hosp_out_fr_dt, hosp_out_to_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by) VALUES( #{writeYear}, 'ICR', #{docNo}, (select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') from esg.tb_incident_report_manage where write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_no=#{docNo}), #{hospitalNm}, #{hospitalTel}, #{hospitalPl}, #{hospInfrDt}, #{hospIntoDt}, #{hospOutfrDt}, #{hospOuttoDt}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy});

INSERT INTO esg.tb_incident_report_opinion (write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, preventive_measures, supervisors_opinion, use_yn, created_at, created_by) VALUES( #{writeYear}, 'ICR', #{docNo}, (select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') from esg.tb_incident_report_opinion where write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_no=#{docNo}), #{preventiveMeasures}, #{supervisorsOpinion}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy});
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_incident_report SET incident_person_id=#{incidentPersonId}, incident_person_nm=#{incidentPersonNm}, witness_person_id=#{witnessPersonId}, witness_person_nm=#{witnessPersonNm}, incident_dt=#{incidentDt}, incident_tm=#{incidentTm}, incident_location=#{incidentLocation}, incident_extent=#{incidentExtent}, comp_opinion=#{compOpinion}, incident_type=#{incidentType}, incident_his=#{incidentHis}, updated_at=now(), updated_by=#{updatedBy}, incident_pm_so=#{incidentPmSo} WHERE write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_type='ICR' AND doc_no=#{docNo};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_incident_report_statement (write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, statement_type, write_dt, statement_content, created_at, created_by) VALUES( #{writeYear}, 'ICR', #{docNo}, (select LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq)::integer, 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') from esg.tb_incident_report_statement where write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_no=#{docNo}), #{statementType}, #{writeDt}, #{statementContent}, now(), #{createdBy});
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_incident_report_detail SET incident_detail=#{incidentDetail}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at=now(), updated_by=#{updatedBy} WHERE write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_type='ICR' AND doc_no=#{docNo} AND doc_seq=#{docSeq};

UPDATE esg.tb_incident_report_manage SET hospital_nm=#{hospitalNm}, hospital_tel=#{hospitalTel}, hospital_pl=#{hospitalPl}, hosp_in_fr_dt=#{hospInfrDt}, hosp_in_to_dt=#{hospIntoDt}, hosp_out_fr_dt=#{hospOutfrDt}, hosp_out_to_dt=#{hospOuttoDt}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at=now(), updated_by=#{updatedBy} WHERE write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_type='ICR' AND doc_no=#{docNo} AND doc_seq=#{docSeq};

UPDATE esg.tb_incident_report_opinion SET preventive_measures=#{preventiveMeasures}, supervisors_opinion=#{supervisorsOpinion}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at=now(), updated_by=#{updatedBy} WHERE write_year=#{writeYear} AND doc_type='ICR' AND doc_no=#{docNo} AND doc_seq=#{docSeq};
mapper.select: select coalesce(tir.write_year,'')as write_year, coalesce(tir.doc_no,'')as doc_no, coalesce(tir.doc_type,'')as doc_type, coalesce(tir.incident_person_id,'')as incident_person_id, coalesce(tir.incident_person_nm,'')as incident_person_nm, coalesce(tir.witness_person_id,'')as witness_person_id, coalesce(tir.witness_person_nm,'')as witness_person_nm, coalesce(vhi.orgn_id,'')as orgn_id, coalesce(toi.orgn_nm,'')as orgn_nm, coalesce (jbrp.jbrp_nm,'') as jbrp_nm, coalesce(vhi.working_at,'') as working_at, coalesce(vhi.birth_dt,'')as birth_dt, coalesce(vhi.sabun,'')as sabun, coalesce(vhi.phone,'')as phone, coalesce((vhi.addrs1 || vhi.addrs2),'') as addrs, coalesce(vhi2.orgn_id,'') as worgn_id, coalesce(toi2.orgn_nm,'') as worgn_nm, coalesce(vhi2.sabun,'') as wsabun, coalesce(vhi2.phone,'') as wphone, coalesce(tir.incident_extent,'')as incident_extent, to_char( to_timestamp(tir.incident_dt || ' ' || tir.incident_tm, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI'), 'YYYY"년 "MM"월 "DD"일 "HH24"시 "MI"분"경"' ) as incident_dt, coalesce(tir.incident_location,'')as incident_location, coalesce(tir.comp_opinion,'')as comp_opinion, coalesce(tir.incident_his,'')as incident_his, case when tir.incident_type='W' then '산재' else '공상' end as incident_type_nm, coalesce(tir.incident_pm_so,'') as incident_pm_so from esg.tb_incident_report tir left join esg.v_hr_info vhi on tir.incident_person_id = vhi.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on vhi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id left join esg.v_hr_info vhi2 on tir.witness_person_id = vhi2.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi2 on vhi2.orgn_id = toi2.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} where tir.write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no = #{docNo}

select tir.write_year, tir.doc_no, tirs.doc_seq, tir.incident_person_id, tir.incident_person_nm, tir.incident_dt, tirs.statement_type , coalesce (jbrp.jbrp_nm,'') as jbrp_nm, to_char( to_timestamp(tirs.write_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY"년 "MM"월 "DD"일' ) as write_dt, coalesce(tirs.statement_content,'') as statement_content, coalesce(thi.orgn_id,'') as orgn_id, coalesce(toi.orgn_nm,'') as orgn_nm, coalesce(thi.working_at,'') as working_at , coalesce ((thi.addrs1 || '' ||thi.addrs2 ),'') as addrs, coalesce (tdi."Static_desc",'') as StaticComment from esg.tb_incident_report tir left join esg.tb_incident_report_statement tirs on (tir.write_year = tirs.write_year and tir.doc_no = tirs.doc_no) left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on tir.incident_person_id = thi.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join dataset.tb_dataset_incidnetstatmentdesc tdi on tdi.tagettype = tir.doc_type and tdi.type = 'ICR' where tirs.write_year = #{writeYear} and tirs.doc_no = #{docNo} and tirs.statement_type='I'

select tir.write_year, tir.doc_no, tirs.doc_seq, tir.Witness_person_id, tir.Witness_person_nm, coalesce (tir.incident_dt, '') as incident_dt, coalesce (tir.incident_tm, '') as incident_tm, tirs.statement_type , coalesce (jbrp.jbrp_nm,'') as jbrp_nm, to_char( to_timestamp(tirs.write_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY"년 "MM"월 "DD"일' ) as write_dt, coalesce(tirs.statement_content,'') as statement_content, coalesce(thi.orgn_id,'') as orgn_id, coalesce(toi.orgn_nm,'') as orgn_nm, coalesce(thi.working_at,'') as working_at , coalesce ((thi.addrs1 || '' ||thi.addrs2 ),'') as addrs, coalesce (wtdi."Static_desc",'') as wStaticComment, coalesce (tdi."Static_desc",'') as StaticComment from esg.tb_incident_report tir left join esg.tb_incident_report_statement tirs on (tir.write_year = tirs.write_year and tir.doc_no = tirs.doc_no) left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on tir.Witness_person_id = thi.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join dataset.tb_dataset_incidnetstatmentdesc wtdi on wtdi.tagettype = tir.doc_type and wtdi.type = 'WICR' left join dataset.tb_dataset_incidnetstatmentdesc tdi on tdi.tagettype = tir.doc_type and tdi.type = 'ICR' where tirs.write_year = #{writeYear} and tirs.doc_no = #{docNo} and tirs.statement_type = 'W'
select doc_seq from esg.tb_incident_report_statement where write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no=#{docNo} and statement_type=#{statementType}

SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_NM AS FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE AS DOC_TYPE, "extension" FROM ESG.TB_SYS_FILE WHERE TARGET_ID = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo},#{docSeq}) AND TARGET_TYPE = #{docType} order by target_id

SELECT write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, hospital_nm, hospital_tel, hospital_pl, hosp_in_fr_dt, hosp_in_to_dt, hosp_out_fr_dt, hosp_out_to_dt, CASE WHEN hosp_in_fr_dt is null OR hosp_in_to_dt is null THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(date_part('day', hosp_in_to_dt::timestamp - hosp_in_fr_dt::timestamp) + 1, 0) END AS hosp_in, CASE WHEN hosp_out_fr_dt is null OR hosp_out_to_dt is null THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(date_part('day', hosp_out_to_dt::timestamp - hosp_out_fr_dt::timestamp) + 1, 0) END AS hosp_out, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, use_yn FROM esg.tb_incident_report_manage where doc_no=#{docNo} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_seq=#{docSeq} order by doc_seq;

SELECT tird.write_year, tird.doc_type, tird.doc_no, tird.doc_seq, tird.incident_detail, tird.created_at, tird.created_by, tird.updated_at, tird.updated_by, tird.use_yn FROM esg.tb_incident_report_detail tird where doc_no=#{docNo} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_seq=#{docSeq} order by doc_seq;

SELECT write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, preventive_measures, supervisors_opinion, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, use_yn FROM esg.tb_incident_report_opinion where doc_no=#{docNo} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_seq=#{docSeq} order by doc_seq;

select tir.incident_person_id, tir.incident_person_nm, tir.witness_person_id , tir.witness_person_nm,vhi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm from esg.tb_incident_report tir left join esg.v_hr_info vhi on tir.incident_person_id = vhi.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on vhi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id where write_year =#{writeYear} and doc_no =#{docNo}
mapper.delete: Delete from esg.tb_incident_report_statement where write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no=#{docNo} and statement_type=#{statementType}
mapper.select: select t1.* , t2.orgn_nm as searchText2 from esg.tb_corrective_action_request t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.ctrl_orgn_id = t2.orgn_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t1.car_type = 'I' and t1.ctrl_orgn_id = #{searchText}
